title: Phase 5A: Dispatch module - services (dispatch, route, truck) and API routes
description: Build dispatch backend: dispatch service (assign truck, sequence stops, capacity calc, checklist validation), route service (create, optimize, profitability score), truck service (availability, capacity rules), all API routes, and Socket.io events for real-time updates.
steps: Create src/lib/services/dispatch.service.ts with order-to-truck assignment, stop sequencing, capacity calculation, dispatch checklist validation
Create src/lib/services/route.service.ts with route creation, sequence optimization, profitability scoring
Create src/lib/services/truck.service.ts with availability tracking, capacity rules (weight, pieces, bundles, length)
Create src/app/api/dispatch/routes/route.ts and [id]/route.ts with route CRUD
Create src/lib/socket-events/dispatch.ts with real-time events (order-assigned, route-updated, truck-status-changed, stop-status-changed)
